quemSou.conteudo: My name is Assis Berlanda de Medeiros, I am a representative of SIPITU and I developed My Clock with the aim of helping employees control their hours worked in a simple, practical and free way.

porQueCriei.conteudo: The idea arose from the difficulty that many workers face on a daily basis in correctly checking the hours recorded at the time, monitoring overtime, validating payments and identifying possible discrepancies in the payroll.

importante.conteudo: My Clock is not an official company system and has no institutional link with HR, payroll or internal timekeeping systems.

suporte.conteudo: If you encounter technical problems with the application, system errors or suggestions for improvement, you can contact us directly via email:
